analysis.consistency: The feature name, level, and class align with expectations for a high-level class feature.
analysis.quality: The description is clear, mechanically sound, and provides two distinct, powerful options for a 20th-level ability.

mechanics.effect_1: When an attack misses a target within range, change the miss to a hit (Attack Roll modification).
mechanics.effect_2: When an ability check fails, treat the d20 roll as a 20 (Ability Check modification).
mechanics.usage_limitation: Once per short or long rest.

analysis.recommendations: Mechanically strong for a capstone feature. The wording 'If your attack misses' and 'if you fail an ability check' clearly defines the trigger conditions for using the feature.

llm_audit.archivist_notes: Data parsed successfully. Feature details confirmed.
